title: Building a Production Agentic AI Platform: Architecture, Guardrails, and Observability
author: Manjeet Kumar
excerpt: A deep-dive into how I built a production-style agentic AI platform with planner/executor orchestration, typed tool calls, PII guardrails, circuit breakers, SQLite telemetry, and a live operations dashboard.

title: Enterprise AI Workflows: From Pilots to Operating Model
author: Manjeet Kumar
excerpt: A practical operating model for turning AI pilots into governed enterprise workflows across SaaS, logistics, procurement, ERP, and operational teams.

title: Practical Guide to Claude Agent Teams
author: Manjeet Kumar
excerpt: Learn how to use Claude Agent Teams to coordinate multiple AI instances for parallel research, debugging, and modular development locally.

title: The Future of Agentic AI
author: Manjeet Kumar
excerpt: Exploring the shift from chatbots to autonomous agents that can plan, reason, and execute complex workflows.

title: Welcome to My New Blog!
author: Manjeet Kumar
excerpt: I'm excited to launch my new blog where I'll share insights on AI, software architecture, and engineering leadership. Join me on this journey!
